321 Morning Devotion
Pressing on to the last great revival · Awaiting the Lord’s return
📖 Loading today’s devotion…
If this screen never changes, your current browser has JavaScript turned off (common when a file is opened straight from a chat in LINE or Facebook).

Here’s what to do:
Tap the ⋯ menu in the top corner and choose
“Open in default browser” (Safari / Chrome),
and all 171 lessons will read normally.
“Your word is a lamp to my feet, and a light for my path.”
Psalm 119:105
